steps.title: Use Diego's stated hope
steps.content: The passage says Diego had heard about the Valdés girls and hoped to meet them. It also says he hoped to make the acquaintance of their father, the poet Tomás Valdés.

steps.title: Reject invented motives
steps.content: Choice A says Diego wants the sisters to teach him. Choice B adds a request for mentorship. Choice C says he wants feedback on his poems. The answer is D.
